name: Booking Conversion
description: Search-to-book funnel analysis — conversion rates at each stage (search, view, inquiry, book), abandonment patterns, and booking velocity by channel, device, and destination

name: Revenue & Pricing
description: Revenue trends, pricing patterns, seasonal demand, payment method mix, average booking value, revenue concentration, refund impact, and host payout economics

name: Guest Retention
description: Repeat booking behavior, guest cohort retention, churn risk identification, reactivation opportunities, seasonal rebooking patterns, and loyalty across segments

name: Cancellations & Refunds
description: Guest and host cancellation patterns, cancellation timing relative to check-in, refund amounts, policy effectiveness, rebooking after cancellation, and revenue impact

name: Destination Performance
description: Geographic demand patterns, destination seasonality, market penetration, supply vs demand balance by location, emerging vs mature destinations, and cross-destination guest flow
